limitations: This is a descriptive P-1 dataset characterization report, not a detection result.
It makes no anomaly recall, missed-detection, precision, or production-readiness claim.
ORB ratio matching, RANSAC homography, and ECC are observed for alignment selection only; their values are not production decision thresholds.
The alignment diagnostic is a fixed P-1 reporting triage, not a deployment policy; it requires review against labelled change data before production use.

alignment_diagnostic_policy.purpose: P-1 descriptive triage of homography evidence; not a production decision policy
alignment_diagnostic_policy.ecc_rule: ECC is optional; if it converges, correlation must be at least 0.2 for the usable diagnostic class
